title: Healu
shortDescription: Accessible online therapy and wellbeing support.
longDescription: A friendly and accessible mental health platform offering online therapy and emotional well-being support.
description: A friendly and accessible mental health platform offering online therapy and emotional well-being support.
result: Reduced onboarding friction and increased first-session booking confidence.

caseStudy.content: Healu was designed to break down barriers to mental health care by creating a warm, welcoming platform that makes therapy accessible to everyone. The app focuses on creating a safe, judgment-free environment where users can seek help without stigma.

caseStudy.alt: Healu therapy platform interface with calming design

caseStudy.content: The design process prioritized creating a calming, trustworthy interface that would make users feel comfortable sharing their mental health concerns. We used soft colors, gentle animations, and clear navigation to reduce anxiety and build confidence.

Key features include therapist matching, video therapy sessions, mood tracking, guided meditation, and crisis support resources. The platform has helped over 25,000 users access mental health care and has a 95% user satisfaction rate.
